sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76360" key="o)yono/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀψο-νόμος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">νέμω</etym>) <sense id="n76360.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who watches the price of fish</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0502.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
